summary: Comprehensive testing of expanded LMS/SIS integrations including UK providers, CTF import, and CSV import. All 9 features verified. Backend: 27/27 tests passed. Frontend: All UI tabs and provider cards working correctly.

1_GET_providers_returns_16.details: GET /api/integrations/providers returns 16 total providers: google_classroom, canvas, clever, classlink, powerschool, schoology, alma, arbor, sims, bromcom, scholarpack, isams, groupcall, wonde, ctf_import, csv_import

2_GET_providers_region_uk.details: GET /api/integrations/providers?region=uk returns UK providers (arbor, sims, bromcom, scholarpack, isams, groupcall, wonde, ctf_import) plus global providers (google_classroom, canvas, csv_import)

3_GET_status_has_region_category.details: GET /api/integrations/status returns all 16 providers with region and category fields

4_GET_csv_formats.details: GET /api/integrations/import/csv-formats returns 4 formats: SIMS, Arbor, Bromcom, Generic

5_POST_import_preview.details: POST /api/integrations/import/preview accepts CTF and CSV files. CTF parsing supports versions 15.0, 17.0, 18.0. CSV auto-detects format.

6_integrations_tabs.details: Integrations page shows 5 tabs: All (16), Global (3), US (8), UK (8), Import (2)

7_provider_region_badges.details: Provider cards show region badges (US/UK) with appropriate colors. US=blue, UK=red

8_uk_tab_providers.details: UK tab shows 'UK Schools' heading with Arbor Education, SIMS (Capita), Bromcom MIS, ScholarPack, iSAMS, Groupcall Xporter, Wonde, CTF File Import

9_import_tab_cards.details: Import tab shows CTF File Import and CSV/Excel Import cards with 'Import Students' buttons

10_file_import_page.details: File Import page shows Upload File section, CSV Format selector (Generic, SIMS, Arbor, Bromcom), dropzone, and Supported File Formats documentation (CTF and CSV sections)

mocked_apis.uk_provider_apis: MOCKED - Arbor, SIMS, Bromcom, Wonde, etc. APIs are stubbed. Only Google Classroom has OAuth flow.
mocked_apis.ctf_csv_parsing: FUNCTIONAL - CTF and CSV file parsing is fully functional

context_for_next_testing_agent: UK LMS/SIS expansion tested. 16 providers now supported. Key data-testids: provider-{id}, connect-{id}. Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_uk_lms_integrations.py. CTF parsing supports UK Common Transfer File versions 15.0, 17.0, 18.0. CSV parsing auto-detects SIMS, Arbor, Bromcom, Generic formats. File import page at /integrations/import. UK-specific APIs (Arbor, SIMS, Bromcom, Wonde) are stubbed - require real API tokens.
